##LOCALITY=Rowley mine, Maricopa County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Joe Ruiz
##DESCRIPTION=Blue bladed crystals, associated with blue cubes of boleite R130099, irregular masses of blue diaboleite, colorless paralaurionite, colorless gypsum in massive cerussite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130100

##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
